overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit cyberpunk diner. The player moves from the bar counter through a back hallway with vending machines into a sunlit dining area with patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk diner bar counter with teal neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved bar counter, observing the diner interior and staff

notable_agents.action: bartender in red shirt standing behind the counter preparing items

entered.detail: curved teal-colored bar counter with metallic trim and neon underlighting
white and chrome bar stools lined up along the counter
tall glass-door refrigerator containing bottled beverages
illuminated advertisement posters hanging above the bar area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cyberpunk diner bar area with teal neon lighting. The camera moves along the curved bar counter past white stools, while a bartender stands behind the counter in the background. Advertisement posters hang above the bar and a drink refrigerator stands to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner back corridor leading to service door

events.description: approaching and opening the metal security door to enter the back hallway

agents.ego_description: approaching the metal door at the end of the bar and opening it to proceed

entered.detail: large industrial metal door with perforated panel and chrome handle
illuminated menu display board mounted on the wall
yellow cleaning bucket with wringer near the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving past the bar, the camera approaches a metal security door in a narrow corridor. A wall-mounted menu board and yellow cleaning bucket are visible. The player opens the door and enters a dimly lit hallway, leaving the main bar area behind.

events.description: passing the brightly lit Insta-Food vending machine, creating a localized glow

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow hallway past illuminated vending machines

entered.detail: bright yellow vending machine with 'Insta-Food' branding and organic food advertisements
large illuminated sign with 'GIRL BURGER' text in red and blue neon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow service hallway illuminated by vending machine lights. An 'Insta-Food' vending machine glows brightly on the right, alongside a large 'GIRL BURGER' neon sign. The metal door and bar area are now behind as the player progresses toward the dining area.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner seating area with booth tables and large street-facing windows

events.description: exiting the narrow hallway into the open dining area with natural light from windows

agents.ego_description: entering the dining area and observing patrons seated in booths near the windows

notable_agents.action: patron in blue tank top sitting at a booth table facing away from camera

entered.detail: blue upholstered booth seating with wooden tables
large windows allowing natural daylight to enter the dining area
rotating ceiling fan hanging above the dining area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the hallway, the scene opens into a spacious diner seating area with natural light streaming through large windows. Blue upholstered booths line the walls where patrons sit at tables. A ceiling fan rotates overhead as the camera explores the dining space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit bar area through a narrow service corridor and into a bright, sunlit dining hall. It begins by gliding along a curved bar counter under teal neon lights, passing white stools and a drink refrigerator while a bartender stands in the background. As the camera moves past the bar, it passes a wall-mounted menu and a yellow cleaning bucket before opening a metal security door to enter a dimly lit hallway. The scene then shifts into a narrow service passage illuminated by the glow of an Insta-Food vending machine and a bright Girl Burger neon sign. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor into a spacious seating area where natural light streams through large windows, revealing blue upholstered booths and patrons sitting beneath a rotating ceiling fan.
